completion_rule: goal_complete may be true only when all 100 criteria are satisfied and every minimum artifact is present or an explicitly accepted equivalent

status_definitions.satisfied: direct implementation or artifact evidence exists at the audited commit
status_definitions.partial: a contract or partial implementation exists but the criterion lacks required execution, data, or public-product evidence
status_definitions.blocked_by_user_instruction: the operator explicitly deferred the model work required by the criterion
status_definitions.blocked_external: completion requires an immutable upstream handoff, rights decision, live infrastructure receipt, credentialed run, or human production action

authoritative_boundaries.ala: The rebuilt ButterflyLens ALA baseline remains authoritative.
authoritative_boundaries.gbif: The fingerprinted GBIF Parquet pack is complementary and is not silently merged into or substituted for the ALA baseline.
authoritative_boundaries.biominer: BioMiner is still fetching Flickr metadata; no partial output was copied.
authoritative_boundaries.flickr: No Flickr API call was made by this goal.
authoritative_boundaries.models: YOLOE and BioCLIP remain unfinished_not_run by explicit user direction.

criteria.criterion: ButterflyLens is a new public repository.
criteria.rationale: The immutable baseline and non-force push receipts identify the new GitHub repository.

criteria.criterion: All work is committed directly to main.
criteria.rationale: The workflow and receipts record direct main commits.

criteria.criterion: Every subtask has its own commit.
criteria.rationale: Completed subtasks have distinct commit receipts; deferred work is not misreported as completed.

criteria.criterion: Main is pushed after every task.
criteria.rationale: Task push receipts identify local and remote main SHAs.

criteria.criterion: No force push occurs.
criteria.rationale: Every push receipt records forced=false.

criteria.criterion: Every imported component has source repository and SHA.
criteria.rationale: Both upstream migration manifests bind imported or adapted components to exact origins.

criteria.criterion: Build Week baseline and delta are clear.
criteria.rationale: The two documents freeze the before state and quantified delta separately.

criteria.criterion: Primary GPT-5.6 Codex Session ID is recorded.
criteria.rationale: The exact session ID and requested model configuration are recorded without claiming runtime identity observation.

criteria.criterion: Every taxon has a stable identity.
criteria.rationale: Accepted taxa and crosswalk assertions use stable ButterflyLens taxon keys.

criteria.criterion: Every name assertion has provenance and trust.
criteria.rationale: The authoritative name pack retains source, trust, region, language, and query eligibility.

criteria.criterion: First Nations names are never invented or generalized.
criteria.rationale: The policy forbids invention and generalisation; no unapproved name is query eligible.

criteria.criterion: Every Flickr request is fingerprinted.
criteria.rationale: The ledger fails closed on request identity, but the active BioMiner stream has no admitted immutable request artifact.
criteria.next_action: Admit a completed BioMiner Flickr handoff and verify every physical request against the ledger without making new Flickr calls in this goal.

criteria.criterion: Logical and physical queries remain separate.
criteria.rationale: Separate logical definitions, physical requests, and association records are enforced.

criteria.criterion: Every source photo has immutable source identity.
criteria.rationale: Admitted reference media has source identity; the active Flickr stream has no immutable handoff in this repository.
criteria.next_action: Validate immutable provider identities when the completed Flickr handoff is available.

criteria.criterion: Every downloaded image has SHA-256.
criteria.rationale: Current admitted reference objects and the media pipeline require SHA-256, but no completed Flickr media inventory is attached.
criteria.next_action: Verify hashes for every admitted Flickr media object after the immutable handoff.

criteria.criterion: Duplicate groups are preserved.
criteria.rationale: Reference duplicate and mirror relationships are retained as explicit evidence.

criteria.criterion: Every model artifact is fingerprinted.
criteria.rationale: There are no admitted model artifacts because YOLOE and BioCLIP were explicitly skipped.
criteria.next_action: Resume only under a later instruction authorising YOLOE and BioCLIP, then fingerprint every weight, configuration, input, and output.

criteria.criterion: Every review event is append-only.
criteria.rationale: Database authorization and mutation guards preserve append-only review lineage.

criteria.criterion: Every map cell links to evidence.
criteria.rationale: The evidence-link contract exists, but authoritative real impact cells cannot be materialized from the active partial upstream stream.
criteria.next_action: Resolve public ALA rights and admit completed Flickr/model/review evidence before materializing cells.

criteria.criterion: No candidate is silently promoted to an occurrence.
criteria.rationale: Release requires explicit human, quality, rights, and expert gates.

criteria.criterion: One token bucket covers all Flickr methods.
criteria.rationale: A single method-agnostic hourly ledger controls search, metadata, comments, and retry work.

criteria.criterion: Hard usage never exceeds 3,500 calls/hour.
criteria.rationale: The hard ceiling is enforced and tested across mixed methods.

criteria.criterion: Normal planned usage does not exceed 3,000.
criteria.rationale: The normal lane is separately capped at 3,000.

criteria.criterion: Reserve is tracked.
criteria.rationale: Reserve reservations, commits, releases, and retry use are explicit ledger state.

criteria.criterion: Geo pages use the provider limit.
criteria.rationale: Geo page execution uses the configured provider page limit and validates receipts.

criteria.criterion: Queries reaching the search-result ceiling are partitioned.
criteria.rationale: Ceiling detection and deterministic Australian partitions fail closed on incomplete coverage.

criteria.criterion: Search terms are not treated as labels.
criteria.rationale: Query associations remain retrieval reasons, never scientific labels.

criteria.criterion: Australia-known species run first.
criteria.rationale: The scheduler closes Australian lanes before the separately reserved global lane.

criteria.criterion: Global out-of-range species use a separate hypothesis lane.
criteria.rationale: The fail-closed global lane is explicitly a novel-presence hypothesis, not Australian occurrence evidence.

criteria.criterion: Public pages display no more than 30 Flickr images.
criteria.rationale: Public payloads and page rendering are capped at 30 Flickr images.

criteria.criterion: Attribution and required notice are visible.
criteria.rationale: The public component displays source, creator, licence, provider link, and required notice.

criteria.criterion: BioCLIP runs locally from Hugging Face weights by default.
criteria.rationale: BioCLIP execution and weights were explicitly skipped.
criteria.next_action: Authorise and audit a later local BioCLIP runtime and weight receipt.

criteria.criterion: Flickr images are not uploaded to Hugging Face by default.
criteria.rationale: The architecture permits local-only model processing and no Flickr image upload occurred.

criteria.criterion: YOLOE is a router, not a species classifier.
criteria.rationale: The admitted contract limits YOLOE to routing and records the runtime as unfinished.

criteria.criterion: BioCLIP loads once per worker.
criteria.rationale: Persistent model workers were explicitly left unfinished.
criteria.next_action: Implement and observe one-load worker lifecycle only after model work is authorised.

criteria.criterion: Embeddings are reused.
criteria.rationale: Embedding identity metadata exists, but no embedding was computed or reused.
criteria.next_action: Authorise model work and attach immutable cache-hit evidence.

criteria.criterion: Candidate unions preserve query, geography and visual reasons.
criteria.rationale: Candidate retrieval depends on the explicitly skipped YOLOE and BioCLIP stages.
criteria.next_action: Build and fingerprint the reason-preserving union after model execution is authorised.

criteria.criterion: Higher-rank scores do not catastrophically prune species.
criteria.rationale: No candidate scoring or pruning run exists.
criteria.next_action: Run authorised candidate retrieval and prove species retention with real artifacts.

criteria.criterion: Raw similarities are not displayed as probabilities.
criteria.rationale: Public evidence maturity uses explicit availability and does not expose raw model similarity as probability.

criteria.criterion: Evidence maturity is visible.
criteria.rationale: Per-image and species views expose evidence availability and unavailable reasons.

criteria.criterion: Multiple independent reviewers can receive the same image.
criteria.rationale: Assignment policy supports repeated independent allocation and disagreement escalation.

criteria.criterion: Reviews are blinded where required.
criteria.rationale: Blind campaigns hide model, query, source-comment, and peer evidence until decision.

criteria.criterion: Review events bind user, image, question and version.
criteria.rationale: Review events bind authenticated identity, image hash, question, campaign, and version lineage.

criteria.criterion: Skip is not decisive.
criteria.rationale: Skip is excluded from decisive consensus evidence.

criteria.criterion: Can't view is not decisive.
criteria.rationale: Can't-view events are operational evidence, not identity votes.

criteria.criterion: Conflicts are preserved.
criteria.rationale: Consensus and adjudication preserve conflicting and minority evidence.

criteria.criterion: Expert adjudication exists.
criteria.rationale: Qualified expert adjudication is an explicit append-only workflow.

criteria.criterion: Guests cannot release scientific records.
criteria.rationale: RLS and release procedures deny guest scientific release authority.

criteria.criterion: Contributor celebration does not reward speed.
criteria.rationale: Contributor summaries celebrate evidence impact and exclude speed rankings.

criteria.criterion: Reviewer reliability is private and domain-specific.
criteria.rationale: Reliability remains private and scoped by family, life stage, and visual domain.

criteria.criterion: Reviewer reliability never uses model agreement as truth.
criteria.rationale: The estimator rejects model agreement and majority agreement as reliability truth.

criteria.criterion: Reliability weighting begins only after sufficient evidence.
criteria.rationale: Insufficient evidence preserves equal weight with explicit blockers.

criteria.criterion: Representative audit and failure discovery are separate.
criteria.rationale: Separate audit kinds and claim boundaries are structural requirements.

criteria.criterion: Sampling probabilities are retained.
criteria.rationale: Each representative audit row retains its inclusion probability and sampling frame.

criteria.criterion: Confidence intervals identify their method.
criteria.rationale: Interval method, level, grouping, and resampling evidence are explicit.

criteria.criterion: Effective sample size is reported.
criteria.rationale: The contract and dashboard retain effective sample size separately from reviewed rows.

criteria.criterion: Reviewer agreement is calculated only when valid.
criteria.rationale: Overlap, independence, sufficient evidence, and adjudication lineage fail closed.

criteria.criterion: Species-level quality is visible.
criteria.rationale: The dashboard exposes species quality or an exact unavailable state rather than a fabricated zero.

criteria.criterion: Release requires configured quality gates.
criteria.rationale: Release procedures require configured representative quality and consensus gates.

criteria.criterion: No "more votes guarantee accuracy" claim exists.
criteria.rationale: Project language distinguishes repeated evidence from guaranteed accuracy.

criteria.criterion: ALA is the blue baseline.
criteria.rationale: The visual contract exists, but the public impact map is withheld by rights and upstream evidence gates.
criteria.next_action: Resolve ALA public-product rights and publish evidence-linked impact cells before rendering the blue baseline.

criteria.criterion: Flickr is amber.
criteria.rationale: No completed Flickr handoff or public impact cell set is available.
criteria.next_action: Admit the completed Flickr handoff and render rights-cleared amber candidate evidence.

criteria.criterion: National view uses a heat map.
criteria.rationale: The national query contract exists, but no real public heat map was created.
criteria.next_action: Materialize rights-cleared national cells and implement the public heat-map surface.

criteria.criterion: Lower scopes support bubbles and records.
criteria.rationale: The scope contract exists, but public lower-scope rendering and record drilldown are unfinished.
criteria.next_action: Add rights- and sensitivity-cleared bubble and record views after real cells exist.

criteria.criterion: State drilldown works.
criteria.rationale: State scope is contracted but has no public interaction or real cell artifact.
criteria.next_action: Publish and test state drilldown after map evidence gates clear.

criteria.criterion: IBRA drilldown works.
criteria.rationale: IBRA scope is contracted but has no public interaction or real cell artifact.
criteria.next_action: Publish and test IBRA drilldown after map evidence gates clear.

criteria.criterion: LGA drilldown works.
criteria.rationale: LGA scope is contracted but has no public interaction or real cell artifact.
criteria.next_action: Publish and test LGA drilldown after map evidence gates clear.

criteria.criterion: H3 drilldown works.
criteria.rationale: H3 scope is contracted but has no public interaction or real cell artifact.
criteria.next_action: Publish and test H3 drilldown after map evidence gates clear.

criteria.criterion: Candidate, reviewed and release-ready states differ.
criteria.rationale: Distinct maturity fields are enforced, but no real public impact cells demonstrate the states.
criteria.next_action: Materialize and render evidence-backed state differences after upstream and rights gates clear.

criteria.criterion: Potential contribution is not called a new occurrence.
criteria.rationale: The geographic contract and public-claims policy consistently label candidate contribution as potential.

criteria.criterion: Submitted and live snapshots are distinct.
criteria.rationale: Immutable submitted state and optional timestamped live state are separate modes.

criteria.criterion: The map continues working when the M5 is offline.
criteria.rationale: Offline snapshot behavior is tested, but the public impact map itself is unfinished.
criteria.next_action: Apply the offline projection to the completed public impact map and test it without the worker.

criteria.criterion: GPT-5.6 is a meaningful runtime component.
criteria.rationale: A bounded server runtime exists, but no credentialed live GPT-5.6 invocation or deployment receipt is claimed.
criteria.next_action: Run the bounded representative live evaluation with approved credentials, retain the trace, and obtain human review.

criteria.criterion: GPT-5.6 uses deterministic evidence tools.
criteria.rationale: Fourteen strict read-only tools return bounded fingerprinted results.

criteria.criterion: GPT-5.6 cites artifacts.
criteria.rationale: Every factual live response must cite allowlisted commit-bound artifacts.

criteria.criterion: GPT-5.6 does not identify species from memory.
criteria.rationale: Unknown taxon identities and model-memory claims fail closed.

criteria.criterion: GPT-5.6 cannot fabricate map counts.
criteria.rationale: Unavailable evidence remains unavailable and counts must come from cited deterministic results.

criteria.criterion: GPT-5.6 can explain community impact.
criteria.rationale: A deterministic community-impact tool and evaluation cases exist, with unavailable-state abstention.

criteria.criterion: GPT-5.6 can recommend the next review batch.
criteria.rationale: The bounded recommendation tool returns workflow priority from cited repository evidence.

criteria.criterion: Stored judge replay works without credentials.
criteria.rationale: Credential-free replay validates complete traces and fingerprints without network fallback.

criteria.criterion: Agent evaluations pass.
criteria.rationale: All deterministic grader cases pass, but every live_model_status remains not_run.
criteria.next_action: Run and grade the representative live GPT-5.6 traces before claiming the agent evaluation complete.

criteria.criterion: M5 worker has a heartbeat.
criteria.rationale: The signed heartbeat contract and tests exist, but no live M5 heartbeat receipt is attached.
criteria.next_action: Attach a committed live worker heartbeat after the BioMiner handoff and deployment are stable.

criteria.criterion: Worker restarts automatically.
criteria.rationale: The launchd service is rendered and tested, but installation and observed restart are not evidenced.
criteria.next_action: Install on the target M5 and retain an observed restart receipt without exposing secrets.

criteria.criterion: Pipeline resumes after interruption.
criteria.rationale: Append-only journals and fingerprinted resume plans reconstruct committed work and retry only uncommitted work.

criteria.criterion: No committed API request is repeated.
criteria.rationale: Committed request identities are reused and conflicting repeats fail closed.

criteria.criterion: No committed image is redownloaded unnecessarily.
criteria.rationale: Committed source and content identities prevent unnecessary redownloads.

criteria.criterion: No unchanged embedding is recomputed.
criteria.rationale: Idempotency metadata exists, but embeddings were explicitly not computed.
criteria.next_action: After model work is authorised, attach a real unchanged-input cache-hit receipt.

criteria.criterion: The public site is not hosted from the M5.
criteria.rationale: The public site and submitted artifacts remain independently hosted and queryable.

criteria.criterion: Submitted snapshot remains immutable.
criteria.rationale: The canonical submitted snapshot is fingerprinted and reproducibly frozen.

criteria.criterion: Live updates are append-only and timestamped.
criteria.rationale: The database and projection contracts require append-only timestamped updates, but no live update receipt exists.
criteria.next_action: Attach a verified live snapshot lineage after deployment rather than inferring it from the contract.

criteria.criterion: README clearly explains Codex and GPT-5.6.
criteria.rationale: The README separates Codex engineering from the bounded GPT-5.6 analyst.

criteria.criterion: Public demo requires no private credentials.
criteria.rationale: The Submitted site and analyst replay are credential-free and fail closed without live services.

criteria.criterion: Video is under three minutes.
criteria.rationale: The 2:48 production packet is verified, but no recorded and approved public video exists.
criteria.next_action: Record, edit, approve, caption, and publish the real-product cut at no more than 2:50.

criteria.criterion: Video shows the real product.
criteria.rationale: The script is bound to real routes, but the real-product footage has not been recorded.
criteria.next_action: Capture only the pinned public product, complete human review, and publish the approved video.

criteria.criterion: Judges can review an image.
criteria.rationale: The credential-free Submitted experience supports a local evidence-review interaction with honest persistence limits.

criteria.criterion: Judges can explore the map.
criteria.rationale: No public geographic-impact map or drilldown is claimed.
criteria.next_action: Clear rights and evidence gates, then ship and test the real public map.

criteria.criterion: Judges can inspect the live worker.
criteria.rationale: The page truthfully reports worker evidence unavailable; no live M5 receipt is attached.
criteria.next_action: Connect a rights-safe committed live status feed after the external fetch and worker deployment are complete.

criteria.criterion: Judges can use GPT-5.6 replay.
criteria.rationale: Judges can run the integrity-checked credential-free analyst replay.

criteria.criterion: All displayed metrics come from artifacts.
criteria.rationale: Submitted metrics and analyst facts are bound to fingerprinted local artifacts; unavailable evidence is not rendered as zero.

criteria.criterion: ButterflyLens is demonstrably distinct from BioMiner and TaxaLens.
criteria.rationale: Product, repository, ownership, and component boundaries distinguish the community platform from both upstream projects.

minimum_artifacts.note: Authoritative stable rows are committed as JSONL rather than Parquet.

Authoritative name rows are committed as JSONL rather than Parquet.

Authoritative rebuilt baseline cells.

Exact artifact is present.

Duplicate and mirror groups are retained in two typed tables.

BioCLIP is unfinished_not_run.
Prototype construction was explicitly skipped.
Candidate scoring was explicitly skipped.

Contract and database table exist, but no immutable live campaign snapshot is attached.

Append-only storage exists, but no real community event snapshot is attached.
Consensus implementation exists, but no real consensus snapshot is attached.
Private estimator storage exists, but no eligible live snapshot is attached.
The Submitted state explicitly reports that no representative audit snapshot is available.
Real cells await completed upstream and rights-cleared evidence.
Summaries cannot precede real impact cells.
No public map release is claimed.
No candidate has passed the configured human, quality, rights, and expert gates.
Builder capability exists, but no release-ready evidence packet is published.
A deterministic builder exists, but no release-ready archive is published.
No accepted release is available to manifest.
Heartbeat contracts exist, but no live M5 receipt or connected view is attached.
Submitted operations truthfully reports unavailable live stages.
Only the immutable Submitted unavailable-state projection exists.
Exact artifact is present and fingerprinted.
Exact artifact is present.
The versioned submitted replay catalogue is the credential-free stored analyst replay.
Exact artifact is present; live_model_status remains not_run.
Exact append-only configuration and activity ledger is present.
